cost_name: PEM Stack — Normand'Hy 200 MW Project Actual — France 2024

estimation.estimation_method: Derived from Air Liquide total CAPEX disclosure (>€400M). Stack portion estimated from IEA benchmark percentage of total electrolyzer system cost. Not audited actual — derived from total CAPEX.

confidence.rationale: Total CAPEX is Level A (Air Liquide official disclosure). Stack proportion is DERIVED (estimated at ~36% of total CAPEX based on IEA cost breakdown for large-scale PEM). No published stack-specific cost from Air Liquide. Downgraded to D because stack cost is inferred, not stated.

primary_drivers: French State IPCEI support reducing effective cost to developer

sources.title: Air Liquide Normand'Hy — Total investment >€400M (2024 FID)
sources.author: Air Liquide
